## Privacy Checklist

- [ ] No raw financial rows, account numbers, private exports, `.env` files, or
      local databases are included.
- [ ] Examples, fixtures, logs, and screenshots are synthetic or redacted.
- [ ] The PR does not ask reviewers or users to share private financial data.

## Contract Checklist

- [ ] Public CLI behavior is unchanged, or the compatibility impact is explained.
- [ ] CLI JSON/schema contracts are unchanged, or tests and docs were updated.
